item.title: Machi(@machibigbrother) is selling Bored Apes at a loss to fund his $ETH longs on Hyperliquid. Is he running out of money? Over the past month, Machi has sold 34 Bored Apes for 326 $ETH ($514K), incur

item.title: SharpLink(@Sharplink) just bought another 29,196 $ETH($46.7M). Over the past 3 days, #SharpLink has bought a total of 39,196 ETH ($62.4M).
item.description: pSharpLink(a href="https://nitter.net/Sharplink" title="Sharplink"@Sharplink/a) just bought another 29,196 a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23ETH"$ETH/a($46.7M).br /br /Over the past 3 days, a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23SharpLink"#SharpLink/a has bought a tota

item.title: AMLBot Puts Polymarket Phishing Toll at $3.1M Across 11 Wallets, Funds Traced to Ethereum
item.description: Blockchain intelligence firm AMLBot has confirmed the Polymarket supply-chain attack total at approximately $3.1 million in PUSD across 11 user wallets, with funds bridged from Polygon to Ethereum and converted to ETH. Polymarket has pledged full refunds but has not named the compromised vendor.

item.title: Aave Confirms Aavenomics 3.0 Is Live With Buybacks and DAO Spending Cut
item.description: Aave confirmed Saturday that Aavenomics 3.0 is now active, with automated AAVE token buybacks running and DAO operational spending reduced, completing a governance roadmap the protocol has built toward since mid-2024.

item.title: Strategy's Enterprise mNAV Drops Below 1 for the First Time
item.description: Strategy's enterprise market-to-NAV ratio crossed below 1 on Thursday for the first time, putting the combined weight of its debt, preferred stock, and equity above the value of its 847,363-bitcoin treasury and closing the equity-accretion channel that powered its buying spree.

item.title: RT by @polymutex: Walletbeat hit Berlin Blockchain Week 🇩🇪 Panels. Workshops. Interviews. One Devcon invite. We had a week 👀 Thanks to everyone who stopped to talk wallets, privacy, and standards with
item.description: pWalletbeat hit Berlin Blockchain Week 🇩🇪br /Panels. Workshops. Interviews. One Devcon invite.br /We had a week 👀br /br /Thanks to everyone who stopped to talk wallets, privacy, and standards with us 🙏🌸/pa href="https://nitter.net/walletbeat/status/2070867605326266807#m"br /Videobr / img src="https

item.title: Aave Advances Automated AAVE Buyback Overhaul With Aavenomics 3.0
item.description: Aave founder Stani Kulechov previewed Aavenomics 3.0 on X Thursday, an automated on-chain buyback mechanism that would route all protocol and GHO revenue to AAVE holders by default, replacing the existing discretionary committee-directed program.

item.title: Is vitalik.eth(@VitalikButerin) selling $ETH again? A wallet linked to #VitalikButerin transferred 7,000 $ETH($11.06M) to a newly created wallet 2 hours ago. https://arkm.com/explorer/address/0xd04daa

item.title: ClosedAI unironically naming their models Sol, Terra, and Luna is mostly just a reflection of how completely irrelevant crypto has faded within the tech world.

item.title: Garrett(@GarrettBullish) is shorting $ZEC again. He just opened a 2x short on 11,780 $ZEC($4.92M). His previous two $ZEC trades were both profitable, earning him a total of $11.66M. He is also holding
item.description: pGarrett(a href="https://nitter.net/GarrettBullish" title="Garrett"@GarrettBullish/a) is shorting a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23ZEC"$ZEC/a again.br /br /He just opened a 2x short on 11,780 a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23ZEC"$ZEC/a($4.92M).br /br /His previo

item.title: Kraken's xStocks Opens Bending Spoons IPO Registration to EEA Retail
item.description: Kraken's xStocks platform is opening non-binding interest registration for the Bending Spoons IPO to eligible customers in the EEA and select global markets, the tokenized equities infrastructure's second pre-IPO offering after a troubled SpaceX debut.

item.title: SharpLink(@Sharplink) just bought another 5,000 $ETH($7.88M)!
item.description: pSharpLink(a href="https://nitter.net/Sharplink" title="Sharplink"@Sharplink/a) just bought another 5,000 a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23ETH"$ETH/a($7.88M)!/pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/media%2FHLyCVBEagAABbQH.jpg" /hr /blockquotebLookonchain (@lookonchain)/bppAfter 8 months

item.title: Polymarket Confirms $3 Million Loss From Third-Party Front-End Supply-Chain Breach
item.description: Polymarket confirmed hackers drained approximately $3 million through a compromised third-party vendor that injected malicious code into the platform's website, and pledged full refunds to fewer than 15 affected accounts.

item.title: Zuckerberg Urges Meta to Explore Polymarket and Kalshi Partnerships
item.description: Mark Zuckerberg has pushed Meta's leadership to explore partnerships with Polymarket and Kalshi, per a new New York Times report, days after a separate report revealed Meta is building its own prediction-market app called Arena.

item.title: Chainlink Launches Project Pangea With 50+ Banks Across 16 Countries for T+0 FX Settlement
item.description: Chainlink and a multinational consortium of more than 50 banks across 16 countries launched Project Pangea at Point Zero Forum in Zurich, targeting real-time atomic settlement for the $9.6 trillion-a-day global foreign exchange market via Chainlink rails, Swift messaging, and regulated EUR and KRW

item.title: 🔗 Chart Link (Infographics Enabled): https://app.santiment.net/screener?utm_source=x&utm_medium=post&utm_campaign=screener_price_updates_b_062626&aff=3 📈 Friday’s bounce gave crypto traders a needed c

With

item.title: Ripple Launches RLUSD in Japan via SBI as Circle and Nomura Join Stablecoin Race
item.description: Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin went live in Japan on Tuesday after receiving approval from Japan's Financial Services Agency, becoming the first foreign-issued stablecoin classified under Japan's revised Payment Services Act.

item.title: June has had record Bitcoin ETF outflows, with over $3.6B exiting so far.
item.description: pJune has had record Bitcoin ETF outflows, with over $3.6B exiting so far./pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/media%2FHLxIHEQXUAAS50U.jpg" /

item.title: 17 Democratic Senators Seek to Bar CFTC From Funding Prediction-Market State Lawsuits
item.description: Seventeen Democratic senators are urging the Senate Appropriations Subcommittee to include a rider in the FY2027 spending bill that would prohibit the CFTC from using any federal funds to sue states over prediction-market regulation, escalating a multi-front jurisdictional battle spanning nine

item.title: Why Wall Street's Biggest Traders Are Abandoning Crypto for Prediction Markets | Alex Momot
item.description: Prediction markets are entering a new phase — and the biggest market makers in the world are taking notice. Alex Momot, Co-founder of Peanut Trade, joins Camila Russo to break down the mechanics, the opportunity, and the risks behind this fast-moving space.

item.title: Base Suffers Second Chain Halt in 24 Hours, Complicating B20 Activation Window
item.description: Base stalled block production for a second time in less than 24 hours on Friday morning, describing the incident as showing 'similar symptoms' to Thursday's roughly two-hour outage, with the event arriving less than three hours before the B20 Activation Registry was anticipated to go live.

item.title: Canton Network Tops Blockchain Fee Rankings With $60M in 30 Days
item.description: Canton Network, the privacy-enabled institutional blockchain built by Digital Asset, generated $60.2 million in fees over the trailing 30 days, outpacing Tron's $27.6 million and Ethereum's $11.3 million by a wide margin, according to DefiLlama data.

item.title: Bipartisan Senators Ask CFTC Chair Whether Agency Is Investigating Polymarket's Fake-Bet Campaign
item.description: Senators Adam Schiff and John Curtis sent a letter to CFTC Chair Michael Selig Thursday asking whether the agency is investigating Polymarket's paid influencer scheme, putting the regulator in a bind over a platform it licenses but whose staged trades ran on an offshore site beyond its direct reach.

item.title: Securitize Goes Public on NYSE July 2 With $400M From SPAC Merger
item.description: Securitize, the tokenization platform behind BlackRock's BUIDL fund, is set to begin trading on the NYSE on July 2 under the ticker SECZ after a SPAC merger with Cantor Equity Partners II that raised over $400 million, including an oversubscribed $225M PIPE.

item.title: 📈 Tokenized stocks have quickly become one of crypto’s hottest narratives, and Solana has emerged as the blockchain of choice for much of that momentum. The launch and expansion of tokenized equities
item.description: p📈 Tokenized stocks have quickly become one of crypto’s hottest narratives, and Solana has emerged as the blockchain of choice for much of that momentum. The launch and expansion of tokenized equities on Solana, offering 24/5 trading, near-instant settlement, and DeFi compatibility, has fueled a sur

item.title: RT by @polymutex: We took Walletbeat to Berlin Blockchain Week 🇩🇪🌸 Talks, workshops, interviews, and one very exciting invite. Here's our full recap 🧵👇

item.title: 📺 Our freshly published This Week in Crypto episode takes a look at Bitcoin’s battle at $60K, and traders targeting Saylor & Strategy. Check out our analysis on what’s happened and what’s ahead for cr
item.description: p📺 Our freshly published This Week in Crypto episode takes a look at Bitcoin’s battle at $60K, and traders targeting Saylor &amp; Strategy. Check out our analysis on what’s happened and what’s ahead for cryptocurrency! 👇br /a href="https://piped.video/watch?v=1E4bGIFRKwE"piped.video/watch?v=1E4bGIFR

item.title: R to @l2beat: Groth16 setups run in phases. Phase 1 is universal, circuit-independent - one ceremony is reused across many projects. Phase 2 is circuit-specific - each project runs its own and some ha
item.description: pGroth16 setups run in phases.br /Phase 1 is universal, circuit-independent - one ceremony is reused across many projects. Phase 2 is circuit-specific - each project runs its own and some have a high number of community participants.br /The weakest one of these phases is the real trust assumption, a
